data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.address, '' as as_manname, '' as manager_name, '' as as_position, '' as as_bookno , '' as c_data_group, '' as adtm_bookdate, '' as c_text, '' as c_type, '' as c_doc_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name, sc_cnt_m_coop.district_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.province_code, sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode, sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name,
sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name,
'' as certificate_date, '' as data_group, '' as data_type, '' as data_balance, '' as data_refno , '' as data_monthly
, '' as dep_name
, '' as loan_name
, '' as est_int
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE 1 = 2

data.name: c_address_1.Expression
data.value: Iif( IsNull([ADDRESS]), '' , Trim([ADDRESS]) ) + 'ต. ' + Iif( IsNull([TUMBOL_NAME]), '' , Trim([TUMBOL_NAME]) ) + ' อ.'+Iif( IsNull([DISTRICT_NAME]), '' ,Trim([DISTRICT_NAME]) ) +' จ.'+ Iif( IsNull([PROVINCE_NAME]), '' ,Trim([PROVINCE_NAME]) )
